query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(CASE WHEN "cuisineType" IS NOT NULL AND "cuisineType" = LOWER("cuisineType") THEN 1 END) as lowercase_cuisine,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN "cuisineType" IS NOT NULL AND "cuisineType" != LOWER("cuisineType") THEN 1 END) as capitalized_cuisine,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN "cuisineType" IS NULL THEN 1 END) as no_cuisine
FROM recipes;
